Temporal: The 9-Year Journey to Fix Time in JavaScript
https://bloomberg.github.io/js-blog/post/temporal/

external.description: JavaScript's Date object has been a source of bugs for three decades. Temporal, which just reached Stage 4, is a modern replacement with immutable types, first-class time zone and calendar support, and nanosecond precision. This is the story of how Bloomberg, Igalia, and the TC39 community spent nine years turning an idea into a shipping standard.
external.title: Temporal: The 9-Year Journey to Fix Time in JavaScript

I did mine differently, first prompted:

Given everything you know about me, and all of our past conversations, consider what kind of AI art challenge i would create. they generally have themes for each day, may or may not have an overarching theme, may last a week or a whole month, and have a hashtag to add so people can browse all the submissions - but, this isnt to say it must be done this way, only to give you an idea of what they are like.

can you create a promotional image for abyss & bloom, listing out each day (dont have to provide description of each day, only the main theme like "starrot" and "hearth of the void". make sure text is primary focus, should be crisp and legible.

Note I was a bit lucky, as it made two images at once, the first having a lot of errors in the text

images.alt:
A stark and haunting landscape stretches across a wide mountain valley where three riders on horseback travel along a narrow dirt path. The riders are seen from behind, their figures wrapped in heavy cloaks and travel-worn clothing. One wears a broad hat while another carries a long weapon or staff slung across their back. Their horses move slowly through tall grasses and scattered wildflowers tinged with muted red, suggesting late autumn or a land marked by quiet decay.

Ahead of them rises an enormous mountain whose shape resembles a colossal human skull emerging from the earth. The eye sockets form vast dark caverns carved into the rock, while the hollow nasal cavity descends like a deep ravine down the face of the formation. Sparse dead trees grow along the skull’s crown and slopes, their bare branches reaching upward like skeletal fingers. Thin mist and drifting clouds gather around the mountain, partially obscuring its upper edges and giving it an otherworldly presence.

The surrounding valley is framed by distant mountain ridges fading into pale fog. Above the skull-shaped peak, the sky is washed in soft gray light, with scattered birds circling high in the air. The entire scene carries a monochrome palette dominated by ash-gray, charcoal, and faded earth tones, with only subtle hints of red flowers breaking the bleak terrain.

The riders appear small against the immense skull mountain, emphasizing the scale and ominous weight of the place they are approaching, as if journeying toward a mythic landmark shaped by ancient ruin or forgotten legend.

Keywords
skull mountain, dark fantasy landscape, three riders, ominous valley, skeletal terrain, mythic journey, barren trees, gothic wilderness, surreal geology, apocalyptic scenery

images.alt:
A warm sunset scene unfolds along the shoreline as two figures run through shallow ocean water toward the horizon. The low sun sits just above the distant line where sea meets sky, casting a radiant golden glow across the entire scene. Its light reflects in long shimmering streaks across the rippling surface of the water, turning the waves into flickering bands of amber and bronze.

In the foreground, the two runners appear as dark silhouettes against the bright sunlit background. Their bodies lean slightly forward in motion, legs lifting through the shallow surf as water splashes upward around their steps. Droplets catch the sunlight midair, forming sparkling arcs of golden spray. One runner’s hair lifts in the wind, suggesting speed and movement as they race along the edge of the tide.

The wet sand beneath the water mirrors the sky’s warm tones, reflecting the sun and the figures in soft blurred shapes. Farther along the beach, several distant people appear as small silhouettes walking or standing along the shoreline. The sky transitions from deep golden orange near the horizon to softer pale tones higher above, with the fading daylight stretching across the open water.

The scene captures a fleeting moment of carefree motion and summer warmth, where light, water, and movement blend into a glowing memory of sunset at the beach.

Keywords
sunset beach run, ocean splash silhouettes, golden hour shoreline, summer evening light, running through waves, sparkling water droplets, coastal sunset scene, motion at the tide, warm ocean horizon, reflective wet sand

images.alt:
Inside a vast Gothic cathedral, a large humanoid robot kneels on the stone floor near the center aisle. Its body is composed of rounded mechanical segments in worn metallic tones of gray, orange, and muted red. The robot’s head tilts slightly downward as if in contemplation, its circular optical lens facing the ground. One articulated hand rests on the polished stone floor while the other bends at the elbow, giving the machine a posture that resembles quiet reverence or exhaustion.

The cathedral interior rises high above the figure, filled with tall pointed arches, ribbed vaults, and massive stone columns. Sunlight filters through towering stained-glass windows that flood the space with vivid colors—deep reds, glowing oranges, bright blues, and emerald greens. The light spills across the walls and floor in fragmented reflections, creating painterly patterns that shimmer across the robot’s metal surfaces.

Behind the kneeling figure, the nave stretches toward a distant altar framed by ornate architectural carvings and more stained glass. Wooden pews line both sides of the aisle, their dark surfaces contrasting with the brilliant colors cast by the windows. The stone floor beneath the robot appears slightly wet, reflecting the cathedral’s colored light in soft ripples that mirror the machine’s silhouette.

The scene blends sacred architecture with futuristic machinery, creating a striking juxtaposition between ancient spiritual space and a solitary technological presence adopting a human gesture of humility.

Keywords
kneeling robot, gothic cathedral interior, stained glass light, techno gothic scene, sacred architecture, mechanical figure, reflective stone floor, futuristic machine, cathedral nave, spiritual technology
